hero.headline: Silkadelics
hero.subheadline: The premium live band perfect for your event.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We create the soundtrack to your dreams.
about.description: Silkadelics are a premium live band, made up of professional musicians dedicated to elevating every event to a level of excellence. We deliver an unforgettable musical experience, with a carefully curated repertoire that spans the biggest hits in rock, pop, funk, soul, and dance music. Our mission is to create the perfect atmosphere for your special day, combining refined musicianship with contagious energy on stage. We adapt to each client’s vision and to the style of every event, offering a performance that is versatile, elegant, and memorable. From the sophistication of an intimate cocktail set to the impact of a live concert for hundreds of guests, we guarantee absolute professionalism. Our recommended repertoire includes iconic artists such as Coldplay, Linkin Park, Bruno Mars, Oasis, and Kings of Leon, but flexibility is one of our greatest strengths.

features.title: Musical Excellence
features.description: Professional musicians with years of experience.

features.title: Versatility
features.description: From Jazz to Pop, we adapt to your taste.

items.title: Weddings
items.description: Celebrate love with distinction. We provide music for the ceremony, cocktail hour, dinner, and an unforgettable party with our main concert.

items.title: Corporate
items.description: Impact and professionalism for galas, brand launches, and corporate parties. We adapt the energy to your brand's profile.

items.title: Private Parties
items.description: Birthdays, themed parties, and exclusive celebrations. Personalized music for the moments that matter most to you.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What they say about our art

items.name: Ana Farias
items.text: I sought out Beatriz's services because I wanted to leverage the skills I already had to change careers. I was afraid to hire an HR professional because, if I didn't know what job I wanted, how could she help me? 'An HR professional can't know every field and every niche!', I thought. Beatriz gave me an extraordinary brainstorming session. Observant and full of great questions, she drew out what I knew without realising it, and works her professional magic to transform that information into concrete and tailored possibilities.

items.name: Murilo Evangelista
items.text: Beatriz helped me at a very important moment in my career, a moment of transition in which her support and attention was crucial for my new challenge. Beatriz is a very dedicated, attentive and results-committed professional.

items.name: Hélia Barros
items.text: Beatriz embraced HBnutrição's needs with a dedication and professionalism that are hard to find nowadays. The needs were urgent and very specific, and her response from day one was 'nothing is impossible'. The procedures were always developed in close partnership with the clinic's management, but with an autonomy and immersion that allowed us to delegate with confidence!

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend at least 6 to 12 months in advance, especially for high season (May to September). However, feel free to inquire about last-minute openings.

items.question: Does the band provide sound and lighting equipment?
items.answer: Yes, all our packages include a professional sound system and stage lighting suitable for the venue, ensuring the best technical quality at no extra cost.

items.question: How does repertoire selection work?
items.answer: Select from our {count} songs. We create a tailored setlist for your event. For the Weddings pack, there is always room to include 1 special song of your choice, giving the couple a unique moment during their celebration.

items.question: Do you travel outside your region?
items.answer: Yes, Silkadelics perform across mainland Portugal, the islands, and internationally. Travel costs are calculated on a case-by-case basis to ensure the best value.

items.question: How long is the live performance?
items.answer: Our standard concert performance lasts 2 hours (which can be split into sets). We are flexible and can adjust the duration according to your event's schedule.

items.question: What languages are included in the repertoire?
items.answer: We sing predominantly in English and Portuguese, covering the greatest national and international hits.
